---
name: Script in progress
about: Track script writing and readiness
title: "Script: "
labels: script
assignees: []
---

## Video title

Final or near final title.

## Episode number

If part of a series, note it here.

## Script status

Draft  
Revising  
Ready for voice recording  

## Core truth

One sentence summary of the video.

## Estimated length

Minutes and seconds.

## Notes for AI voice

Pacing notes  
Pauses to add  
Tone reminders  

## Visual style notes

Stock footage ideas  
Text moments  
Minimal transitions  

## Final Auntie check

Is this calm  
Is this honest  
Is this patient  

## Ready when

Script reads clean out loud  
No filler language  
No rushed sections
